productDisplayName: Puma Women Karlie Blur Wn's Dazzling Blue Casual Shoes
description: A retro sneaker and ballet shoe come together to give you the puma Karlie shoe. Versatile, comfortable and feminine, this ballerina-inspired shoe is a perfect buy for those who love aerobics and dancing.UpperFabric upper with synthetic leather overlays for breathable comfort, durability and styleMesh inner lining for enhanced breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMouth elasticated on the sides for a snug fitEco-Ortholite environment-friendly footbed for sweat-free comfort, with foam padding that retains 95% of its shape for years on end, offering a perfect lightweight fitOutsoleRubber outsole textured ergonomically with strategically placed pivot points on the forefoot for ease of movement and absolute gripWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
